titleStmt.title: SII 10.430: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 430. (A.R. No. 193 of 1905.) ON THE SAME WALL. Pramādi (Ś. 1192 ?)

summary.p: States that the Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Parichchhēda Allāḍanāthadēvarāja and his younger brother Bhīmarāja gave 25 cows for a perpetual lamp in the temple of Tripurāntaka-Mahādēva for the merit of their father Gōkarāja.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāmaṁḍalēśvara vīramāhēśvara vijayavāṭikāpurava
rādhīśvara kollipākapuravarādhīśvara ripupuratripuramahēśvara durjjayakulakulācalamrigēṁdra satyahariśca
ṁdra śrīkṛṣṇavēṇyānadī dakṣiṇaṣaṭsahasragrāmāvanīvallabha Eladāyarakkasa paraba
lakarkaśa pracaṁḍamārttaṁḍa raṇaraṁga bhairava . sahakārabāṁ
dhava calamaṟtupārtakāmōdavīramukhadarppaṇa . vibudhasaṁtarppaṇa .
vīramurāri vilāsavidyādhara . bhōgapuraṁddara . patimeccugaṁḍa . cōḍakaṭakavajra prākāra .
raṭṭakaṭakarakṣapālaka . cāḷukyarājyamaṁdirimūlastaṁbha . vijayapariraṁbhaṇōtsuku laina nā
mādisamastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara paricchēda Allāḍanādhadēvarājuluvāri
lammulu bhīmarājuluṁ dama taṁḍrigōkarājulakuṁ dharmmuvugānu pramādisaṁvatsara puṣya
bahuḷa 7 gu . vāramuna Uttarāyaṇasaṁkrāṁttinimittamuna śrīmattripurāṁttakaśrīmanma hādē
varaku Akhaṁḍadīpamuku peṭṭina mōdālu 25 vīniṁ jēkoni Evvaramutipireḍibōyuṁḍu vu
trānupautrikamu nitya tavveṇḍu neyi Ācandrārkkamu naḍapangalavāṇḍu . maṁgaḷama
hāśrīśrīśrī . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harēta vasuṁdharāṁ ṣaṣṭi rvvaruṣasahasrāṇi vi
ṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi .
Digital edition of SII 10.430 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
